title: Free AWS EC2 Monthly Calculator 2026 | Hacé Cuentas
description: Calculate AWS EC2 on-demand monthly costs. Free pricing calculator for all instance types with 2026 rates.
intro: Technical calculations in IT and development are fundamental: latency, bandwidth, SLA uptime, cloud costs, algorithmic complexity. Accurate initial cost estimation prevents infrastructure over-provisioning. This calculator provides approximate EC2 AWS on-demand costs. Values are updated to 2026 and reviewed periodically.
keyTakeaway: Formula: **hourly price × 720 hours**. Direct application with your inputs. Approximate EC2 AWS on-demand cost.
useCases: Technical calculations related to AWS EC2 monthly costs

faq.q: How much does t3 micro cost per month?
faq.a: Free tier first year, then approximately $10/month.
Approximately $30/month. Good for small production applications.

faq.q: How much does m5 large cost?
faq.a: Approximately $70/month. Comes with 2 vCPU and 8 GB RAM.

faq.q: How much does r5 2xlarge cost per month?
How much can I save with EC2 reserved instances?
faq.a: 30-75% discount if you commit to 1-3 year term compared to on-demand pricing.

faq.q: How much do spot instances cost?
faq.a: Up to 90% discount compared to on-demand, but workloads can be interrupted.

faq.q: Are there any free AWS calculators?
faq.a: Yes, all our calculators are completely free and require no registration.
